title: Ripple Invests in Flutterwave, Expands RLUSD to Africa
summary: Ripple has invested in Flutterwave's $3.2 billion Series E funding round, supporting the integration of its RLUSD stablecoin and XRP Ledger across 34 African markets. This move aims to boost financial inclusion and digital payments in the region.
body:
Ripple, the blockchain payments company, has announced its investment in Flutterwave's Series E funding round, which values the African fintech giant at $3.2 billion. This investment will facilitate the integration of Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin and XRP Ledger technology across 34 African markets, enhancing cross-border payment solutions and financial services.

The collaboration between Ripple and Flutterwave is set to leverage Flutterwave's extensive reach in Africa, where it processes over $19 billion in transactions annually. By integrating RLUSD and the XRP Ledger, the partnership aims to provide faster, more cost-effective, and transparent payment solutions for businesses and consumers in the region. This move is expected to significantly reduce the barriers to financial inclusion and digital payments in Africa.

For everyday people, this partnership means more accessible and affordable financial services. Users in Africa will benefit from lower transaction fees, faster cross-border payments, and greater financial stability through the use of RLUSD. This initiative could also spur economic growth by enabling small businesses to participate more effectively in global trade.

Additionally, the integration of the XRP Ledger is expected to enhance the security and efficiency of transactions. Ripple's technology is known for its speed and low costs, which are critical for regions with underdeveloped financial infrastructure. This investment and partnership highlight the growing importance of blockchain technology in driving financial innovation in emerging markets.

For those interested in the crypto and fintech space, this development is a clear indicator of the increasing adoption of blockchain solutions in Africa. It's worth keeping an eye on how this partnership evolves and the impact it has on financial services in the region. Read more → https://www.theblock.co/post/404942/ripple-flutterwave-series-3-2-billion-valuation-rlusd-integration?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
twitterThread: Ripple's investment in Flutterwave could revolutionize payments in Africa. RLUSD and XRP Ledger integration across 34 markets is a game-changer.
By backing Flutterwave's $3.2B Series E, Ripple aims to bring faster, cheaper cross-border payments to Africa. RLUSD stablecoin will play a key role.

This partnership could boost financial inclusion and economic growth in Africa. Watch how this develops → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-16-ripple-invests-in-flutterwave-expands-rlusd-to-africa
standaloneTweet: Ripple's investment in Flutterwave could make cross-border payments in Africa faster and cheaper. RLUSD stablecoin integration is a big deal for financial inclusion.
